/usr/bin/ar qc libHenigmaEngine.a CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/Include/Matematika/Matematika.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Risalnik.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/CallBack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Buffers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/NaloziTeksturo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Shaderji.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Risalnik/Narisi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Font/Font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Scene/Scena.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HenigmaEngine.dir/src/Objekt/Objekt.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libHenigmaEngine.a
